12 : game-changing nut splitter

14 : Television with a mosaic-style display
15 : Imagine day naps
16 : Genius or gimmick ?
18 : may be nice indeed
19 : Say goodbye to achy knees
20 : The possibilities are endless
21 : Chopped Chicken Salad That guy low-left must feel totally useless...
22 : truly satisfying I just bought one
23 : Bearing Removal Tool
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: A nice addition to THT
item.description: I really like this song but couldn’t find this specific remix of it. I was able to find both songs that were used though. That’s about as far as I got with my search. Most Viral edit: Video Source is @TaoBaiBaiYa from YouTube: https://youtube.com/shorts/TqhQunzymoA She also has an instagram that others have pointed out in the comments @taobaiyaa : https://www.instagram.com/taobaiyaa/ For the remix of this song: status is still unknown But I did find the female vocals song that seemed to be used as well as the main song. My thinking is this is a custom remix made specifically for this short form video. I think it would be nice to have a full version if possible. I’m not very good at using DAWs, yet so maybe someone more talented and knowledgeable is up for the task? Female vocals song: https://youtu.be/Jd5GaSPeNJY Main song: https://youtu.be/y-4hJN4brtk?si=hr_PfIixBvv-xyKc
item.dc:creator: Mal1t1a

item.title: TOS Vulcan Cosplay
item.description: Crafted this wig was one of my favorite things to do. I'm more of a TNG girl than a TOS, but have always loved the look of the TOS uniforms. Also, before I get hounded again... It's a mirror.

item.title: Thanksgiving clean up saved Imgur posts
item.dc:creator: RubyMoonNite

item.description: Tiny octopus may be hibernating, but that doesn't mean he doesn't still keep an eye on you weirdos. The tiniers are away with their mom, so, making buffalo ranch wings with a side of stir fried cabbage. Be well imgur. Love to a few of you, Best Wishes to most, a hearty go fuck yourself to a select few (you know who you are).
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Thanksgiving? Thighsgiving! THT
item.description:
NO, do NOT judge me! It's not early Christmas decoration! I was just testing if it looks good on photo for next month. STOP
Thought I'll give you some thighs on Thanksgiving! Although I do not approve the origin of the celebration, the tradition of giving thanks, usually surrounded by family and friends and a good meal it's something, as argentinian, I can get behind lol. Any excuse for a good asado with familia is a worthy excuse. Today I'm trying a new color! Didn't think I'd like it, but I dig the pink. I hope you had an amenable reunion. Or that you got yourself a good treat if you're alone.
Sorry for the sneaky selfie at the end, but I wanted to show makeup :P Have a good week, bichitos~
item.dc:creator: ArenJ6

item.title: Sorry for the lack of mentally healthy dumps lately
item.description: But I hear you guys like thigh highs. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: I dun messed up.
item.description: I really just didn't feel like seeing family (trumpers) this year. My wife works grave shift tonight. I was supposed to go to Thanksgiving dinner alone. She always sleeps before a shift, normally till 4:30. The plan was to just say i left early and got home right before she woke up. She woke up real early. She's currently talking with her sister on the phone. She just sent me a text saying she's now "on call" for work tonight. Edit: On the upside, I get to hear her singing to our dog now. God I'll miss her when she divorces me. Edit: I told her I was home and came downstairs. She laughed more than she got upset. I will be promptly putting up the new curtains she picked out. Edit: No we are not in divorce territory. That was a joke/panic attack
item.dc:creator: 5omeWhiteGuy

item.title: 50 reactions
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1197 (Memes of Indigenous American History)
item.description:
It's American Thanksgiving or whatever, so have some memes relating to the history of the Native Peoples of the Americas, pre and post contact-conquest. I acknowledge I live on lands stolen from the Yavapai and Tonto Apache. (Specifically, the Wiipukpaa, or Verde Valley Yavapai; the Tonto Apache refer to themselves as Dil’zhe’e ) Before 1400, ancestors of the modern Hopi also lived in this area; archaeologists call them Sinagua, while their Hopi descendants call them Histatinom. Let us share this bread. Hopefully, something here piques your curiosity, and you learn something new.
The Caral-Supe, along coastal South America, were one of the first areas to have intensified urban and agricultural development in the world, about the same time as Sumer and the Indus Valley.
De Soto's expedition did not go well.
Apparently even Mexíca (Aztec) religion even needs a tier list type thing again, though at least this one is ranked by, uh, queerness I guess?
The birth of Huitzilopochtli, the patron God of war of the Mexíca, who tore through his mother's womb.
Tenochtítlan was apparently a wonder of the world. Alas, destroyed by greed.
Remember this.
For an excellent take on Columbus, I reccomend the three part episode on him from the podcast Behind the Bastards. It's important to consider that EVEN HIS CONTEMPORARIES were like, "whoa dude, this is... this is too much."
Corn. They were growing and domesticating and breeding corn.
There are surprisingly few memes I could find relating to the peoples of the indigenous Pacific Northwest.
The symbol of the Tohono O'odham people over Baboquivari, their sacred mountain. They believe the creator god I'itoi lives in a cave below the base of what they call Vav Giwulik.
Or Maize. This plant is, uh, an A-maize-ing Testament to the ingenuity of Amerindian farmers.
Gotta love arguments that try to recon colonial actions as absolutely okay.
I explained this in a previous meme dump.
The Pueblo Revolt was the most successful single act of anti-colonial action amongst the indigenous peoples of the Americas.
This is the first of what will be MANY memes about Cahokia, one of the most amazing archaeological sites north of Mexico.
Image of Cahokia at its height, around 1200 AD.
Poor Olmec. There's enough differences between those giant stone heads that some archaeologists believe they are portraits of individual rulers.
You will see a LOT of Cahokia memes in this dump. Black Drink was made from the leaves of the Yaupon Holly.
Yes. Yes he is.
The Haudenosaunee are another fascinating indigenous people of North America. They even had a system of what many archaeologists and anthropologists consider "proto-writing"
This. This was a bad event.
Again. Cahokia.
The Pueblo threw the Spanish out. This is the famous Pueblo revolt mentioned in the OTHER racist episode of TNG. You know, the one that nobody pegged as being racist. Though, admittedly, nothing could be as bad as Code of Honor....
The Beaver Wars
The Commanche also excelled in horseriding. I didn't have space for any Commanche memes or Lakota Sioux memes, sorry. I mean, I guess I could have left out some Cahokian memes, but...
I fucking love Cahokia. I specifically took the long route when moving back to Arizona from my ill-fated seminary experience in Boston to visit the place, and it was worth being stuck in St. Louis Traffic for two hours afterward. The place is right outside of East Saint Louis. Your homework, if you live in the area, is to go there and tag me in your photos and post whatever you felt was the most amazing thing you learned there during your visit.
If you survived the gauntlet, you became a senator. Stefan Milo has a great video about the Republic of Tlaxcalteca, worth finding on YouTube. He's a good anthropology YouTuber and cites his sources thoroughly.
I wish I could merge this with the image of Samwise Gamgee saying Po-Tay-Toes, but I don't have the time.
Mexíca halberdier.
Soldiers from the Late Mississipian culture circa 1400-1500. Ponce de Leon would have fought similar warriors on his ill-fated expedition.
Pippin tax. If you are an indigenous person of the Americas and you feel I insulted you in some way (other than my own existence, I can't help you there), please feel free to correct me in the comments. I don't celebrate today, but whether you do or don't, I hope you have a good, or at least tolerable, day. Today's message from Pippin: "Okay okay what Pippin okay. Pippin. [Unintelligible]. Pippin. Pippin. Beep. Pippin. I love you. I love you. Whazzat?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: stupidmoneymonkey

item.title: Need a break? (+ Cat Tax)
item.description:
Need a break from life? I got you! I know I said I wouldn’t be posting on Tuesday, Thursday and Friday but felt today was an exception! <3 I recorded holiday harp content like Carol of The Bells, Canon in D and a few random things like this warm up for Imgur, Instagram, Shorts etc next month and decided I’d post this one now for those who need a break from whatever they’ve got going on today! Im at my Nanas today and I could burn this place down from just overstimulation and the haze of stale opinions but we get to take food home soooo. For extra escapism: Stream all my music on Bandcamp, Spotify etc https://hyperfollow.com/sursie
Cat Tax: Buttons demanding to know WHY she was disturbed this morning! How dare I take this photo before she had time to prepare? I know… /s
item.dc:creator: SursieMetzger
